title: ValidationHub Computational Intake Record v0.1 (Public)
description: Public schema for FactorForge computational validation records. Links a Design Package to a ValidationHub intake entry. Separates computational results (derived from the optimizer) from experimental outcomes (wet-lab, if available). Does not collect raw sequences, identifiers, or contact information.

design_package_id.description: The design_id field from the corresponding FactorForge Design Package (design_package.json).

sequence_publication_source.description: Citation for the public amino-acid sequence used as input. Required when the input protein has a known publication. Do not submit private or proprietary sequences.

public_example_id.description: Stable identifier for a publicly documented example run.

host_organism.description: Host organism used for optimization (e.g., 'Nicotiana benthamiana').

evidence_type.description: Type of evidence: computational only, wet-lab observation, or benchmark reference.

scoring_contract_version.description: Version of the scoring contract used. Current: 'v1.1'.

gc_in_target_range.description: Primitive: true if gc_percent is within the host-specific target range (e.g., 40-47% for N. benthamiana, v3.3.0+; 55-65% for N. tabacum/BY-2).

multi_constraint_pass.description: Derived field: biological_pass AND assembly_pass AND gc_in_target_range. Do not assert manually — always computed from primitives.

multi_constraint_pass_definition.description: Canonical 3-primitive definition of multi_constraint_pass (scoring_contract v1.1). Must match exactly. Expanded 5-primitive form: aa_identity==1.0 AND internal_stop_count==0 AND invalid_codon_count==0 AND gc_in_target_range==true AND forbidden_type_iis_site_count==0 (where biological_pass = aa_identity==1.0 AND internal_stop_count==0 AND invalid_codon_count==0; assembly_pass = forbidden_type_iis_site_count==0).

experimental.description: Wet-lab outcome, if available. Leave outcome_status as 'not_tested' for computational-only records.

outcome_status.description: Outcome of the wet-lab assay, or 'not_tested' if no wet-lab data exists.
